game_client_check: 110 errors (all Cocos Creator engine-type errors — not fixable without CC SDK)

game_client_error_categories.description: Cannot find module 'cc' or its corresponding type declarations
game_client_error_categories.root_cause: Cocos Creator engine types (cc module) are only available inside the Cocos Creator project environment. They are not installed as npm packages.

game_client_error_categories.description: Properties 'scheduleOnce', 'emit', 'on', 'off', 'node' do not exist on component types
game_client_error_categories.root_cause: These methods are provided by the cc.Component and cc.EventTarget base classes, which are unavailable without the cc module types.

game_client_error_categories.category: Target library too old for flatMap
game_client_error_categories.description: Property 'flatMap' does not exist on ObstacleConfig[]; requires ES2019 lib
game_client_error_categories.root_cause: Compilation target is ES2017 but flatMap requires ES2019. Inside Cocos Creator, the tsconfig specifies appropriate lib targets.

game_client_error_categories.description: Dynamic imports are only supported when the --module flag is set to es2020 or later
game_client_error_categories.root_cause: LevelLoader.ts uses dynamic import() syntax, requiring --module commonjs or es2020+. Outside of Cocos Creator's build pipeline this cannot be satisfied with the standalone tsc invocation.
Some scripts reference process.env without @types/node installed in the game-client package. These work inside Cocos Creator's build environment.

manual_required: Cocos Creator WebGL build requires Cocos Dashboard GUI — install Cocos Dashboard 3.8.x, open the glow-island/game-client project, and use Build > WebGL to compile and verify game client TypeScript with proper CC engine types.

All 110 game client tsc errors are engine-type errors that resolve automatically when built inside Cocos Creator's project environment (which ships its own tsconfig and cc type declarations). They are not API contract issues and not fixable via standalone tsc.
